mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, add_user_id, add_date, add_user_div, add_user_ip, add_user_name, chosen_yn FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} and homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY add_date

SELECT (CASE WHEN (survey_start_date || ' ' || survey_start_time <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')) AND (survey_end_date || ' ' || survey_end_time >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS survey_period FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} and homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_open_yn = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.homepage_id, a.add_user_id, a.add_date, a.add_user_div, a.add_user_ip, a.add_user_name, a.member_key, a.chosen_yn, DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE AS rand, ( SELECT DISTINCT FIRST_VALUE(z.short_answer) OVER (ORDER BY z.quest_idx DESC, z.answer_idx DESC) FROM cms_survey_answer_detail z WHERE z.survey_idx = A.survey_idx AND z.add_user_id = a.add_user_id ) AS last_short_answer FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER a WHERE a.survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ) ORDER BY rand

SELECT a.add_user_id, a.add_date, a.add_user_div, a.add_user_ip, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS add_date_str, a.chosen_yn FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER a WHERE 1=1 AND a.survey_idx = #{survey_idx} ORDER BY a.add_date
